# Compliance Reference

These files are duplicates of the canonical sources in `reference/os/`:
- `COMPLIANCE_STANDARDS.md` → see `os/STANDARDS.md`
- `PHI_POLICY.md` → see `os/STANDARDS.md` Part 3
- `SECURITY_COMPLIANCE.md` → see `os/POSTURE.md`

**Do not edit files in this directory.** Edit the os/ originals instead.
